title: Realtime
description: This fabric-based mod allows for the minecraft client/server to read the system time, as well as the current date and day of week and dump it into the scoreboard.
body:
This fabric-based mod allows for the minecraft client/server to read the system time, as well as the current date and day of week and dump them into the scoreboard.
To that end, it adds the /clocktime command. For assistance regarding usage utilise the /help command. (```/help clocktime``` and ```/help clocktime @s```)
